creator: pasi@kanalje.se
text:
(In reply to Ruey-Cherng Yu from comment #1)

The homepage has 3 posts.
The first post is about buying a x-mas present to someone you don't know well.
The second post is about tooth whitening.
The third post is about them having chosen a new web hosting company.

Subscribing using the majordomo adress doesn't seem to work because of a configuration issue but it appears that there is another way to do it through the mailman webinterface.

https://lists.stacken.kth.se/mailman/listinfo/bus

The adress bus@stacken.kth.se goes directly to the list so does not appear to be a way to signup for the mail list.
